---
title: "Trauma-Informed Approaches to Campus Sexual Assault Response"
categories: ["Mixed-Methods Analysis"]
date: "2026-02-26"
image: "../images/VAW_screenshot.png"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---
<iframe src="../VAW TIA Final Paper for Pub.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;">
  This browser does not support PDFs. Please download the PDF to view it.
</iframe>
